ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning algorithm used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for model training */,
  "aic" REAL /* Akaike information criterion (AIC) value */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) value */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean squared error (RMSE) value */,
  "logarithm_score" REAL /* Logarithm score value */,
  "predicted_outcome" REAL /* Predicted outcome value */,
  "percentage_difference" REAL /* Percentage difference in prediction results */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was trained */,
  "trained_by" INTEGER /* User who trained the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store hyperparameters used for training */,
  "variable_selection_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for variable selection (e.g., AIC, LR test) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model to track updates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model, including any notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_trained_by FOREIGN KEY ("trained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset file */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., AIC, MSE, RMSE) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "importance_score" REAL /* Importance score of the variable in the model */,
  "selected_by" INTEGER /* User who selected the variable */,
  "selected_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the variable was selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_variables_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_variables_selected_by FOREIGN KEY ("selected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value for the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value from the model */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between actual and predicted values */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., model, dataset) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the machine learning algorithm used
